message:
🌱 Add redpanda: Improve full disk handling mission (#1526)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "redpanda-2166-improve-full-disk-handling",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "redpanda: Improve full disk handling",
+    "description": "Improve full disk handling. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current redpanda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your redpanda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nhelm list -n redpanda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working redpanda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review redpanda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant redpanda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get configmap -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=redpanda\n```\nCurrently, when a disk fills up we assert out.  This is obviously not that slick, but to be more specific on the impact:\n- In >3 node clusters, nodes will tend to have asymmetric disk use.  The unlucky node with the most bytes will terminate first."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Improve full disk handling",
+        "description": "Assuming this is the assert you are talking about?\n\n```\nOct 17 05:00:27 ip-172-31-20-72 rpk[88172]: ERROR 2021-10-17 05:00:27,468 [shard 0] assert - Assert failure: (../../../src/v/storage/segment_appender.cc:346) 'false' We failed to fallocate file. This usually means we have ran out of disk space. Please check your data partition and ensure you have enough space. Error: std::__1::system_error (error system:28, No>\nOct 17 05:00:27 ip-172-31-20-72 rpk[88172]: ERROR 2021-10-17 05:00:27,468\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get events -n redpanda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Improve full disk handling\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Assuming this is the assert you are talking about?\n\n```\nOct 17 05:00:27 ip-172-31-20-72 rpk[88172]: ERROR 2021-10-17 05:00:27,468 [shard 0] assert - Assert failure: (../../../src/v/storage/segment_appender.cc:346) 'false' We failed to fallocate file. This usually means we have ran out of disk space. Please check your data partition and ensure you have enough space.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "redpanda",
+      "community",
+      "streaming",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },
